itemListElement.reviewBody: Very sad to know about your experience Kiran garu . I imagine what kind of trauma the child might have gone thru.  Non access to the PRINCIPAL itself shows what kind of transparency they have. They are much worried about parents talking to each other(other parents) rather than child development and behaviour. What kind of society and future they are giving to the world starts from school . Such a management n staff is  unacceptable.They won't flourish if they bring in such culture in the kids.

itemReviewed.name: Silver Oaks International School - Rushikonda Campus - Rushikonda

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I wish there was a Zero rating which I could give this school and it’s Principal Y Sunitha
She comes across as a very arrogant and boastful person.she has zero regard to what parents have to say to her regarding the school. She cannot take any kind of feed back from the parents .
She has I only one agenda and that is to take in rich spoiled brats who increase her school funds and she fails to be a good principal and the teachers have also failed under her to maintain the schools discipline and code of conduct .
She does not like to meet parents who talk facts about the school and find faults with the management and the way she is managing the school
She does not like to hear what the parents have to say instead she will only talk and refuse to accept that there is any fault with the way of teaching in the school and the way she manages the school .
Bullying and using foul language is rampant in the school for which there are no strict policies . She refuses to accept that and continues to say that she has 15 years of experience with school management but unfortunately if you go to the school and see how the kids behave and talk and bully the weaker ones , one will know Wht actually is going on in that school . My kid was constantly bullied and harassed by his  classmates for two years in a row but no strict action was taken against the children who did this to my child .
She just brushes off these issues .
Her only agenda is to earn money . There are several other parents whom I have spoken to and they all have the same opinion about her that she is arrogant and head strong and she is boastful . Her approach towards parents is so bad and she will not listen to what you have to say . She will support her teachers  even if they have done wrong and will not try to rectify the problem .The teachers don’t have a fixed text book to teach from and
It’s very hap hazard way of teaching . No fixed curriculum no proper trained teachers for IB BOARD or CBSE Board . The teachers have no training in how to handle kids and talk with them nor do they themselves understand the format in which they have to teach the children . My child studied in Dubai before he came to this school and in no way I can call this an international school or IB board school . The teachers  need more training and need to attend other school workshops as well and interact with other school teachers far senior to them and learn from them .
After joining this school my child started having anger issues and he became more irritable.because  Two years he was constantly bullied and tortured by the other kids . There are many kids who are facing the same issues with this school . I advice parents to do ur research properly before you join your children here in silver oaks Vizag .
As a parent, I cannot in good conscience recommend this school to others seeking a quality education for their children. I hope that the management of Silver oaks School will take immediate action to address these pressing concerns and prioritize its students' well-being.

itemReviewed.name: Silver Oaks International School - Rushikonda Campus - Rushikonda

itemListElement.reviewBody:
As a concerned parent, I feel compelled to share my disappointing experience with Silver oaks School. Despite initially holding high hopes for this institution, my observations have led me to conclude that it needs to provide the quality education and nurturing environment it promises.

-  High Fees for Subpar Services:  The exorbitant fees charged by Silver Oaks School are not justified by the services provided. With zero sports activities, a lack of discipline, and minimal social engagement opportunities, the school clearly prioritizes profit over its students' well-being and development. The management's focus on showmanship rather than substance is disheartening.
-  Bullying and Inappropriate Behavior:  Disturbingly, bullying and the use of filthy language among students are rampant within the school. Despite numerous complaints from parents, both the management and teachers have proven incapable of addressing these issues effectively. The lack of intervention only exacerbates the toxic atmosphere within the school grounds.
-  Principal's Inaccessibility and Fear:  The principal of Silver oaks School appears to be inaccessible and fearful when it comes to engaging with parents. This unwillingness to communicate openly and address concerns reflects poorly on the school's leadership and further undermines trust in its ability to provide a safe and supportive learning environment.

My experience with Silver oaks School has been profoundly disappointing. The combination of unqualified staff, high fees, disciplinary issues, bullying, and a lack of clarity on the curriculum leaves much to be desired. As a parent, I cannot in good conscience recommend this school to others seeking a quality education for their children. I hope that the management of Silver oaks School will take immediate action to address these pressing concerns and prioritize its students' well-being and academic success.

Reply to your comment __________

Thank you for addressing our concerns about the recent review. Comment indicates, Principal struggles with acknowledging parents' concerns, and trying to sweep these concerns under the rug.

As a parent, if your own child faced daily bullying and verbal abuse from classmates, WOULD YOU choose to stay SILENT?

1.  Over the past two years, we've raised concerns regarding incidents of bullying and inappropriate behavior multiple times. We are disappointed to see that these activities continue to occur during school hours. We seek clarification on the actions taken against the perpetrators and question the absence of teachers during such incidents. Additionally, WE NEED REASSURANCE THAT THE SCHOOL will take responsibility for ANY UNFORESEEN ACCIDENTS that may occur in the future.

2.  There are doubts regarding the effectiveness of the principal in terms of her education, experience, and ability to manage the school operations and students. We've attempted to reach out to her on several occasions, only to find her occupied in her office. This observation was made personally during my visit to the school.

3.  I want to stress that our primary concern is not about comprehending the IB philosophy but rather about addressing the pressing challenges our kid encounter within the school environment. Regarding your reference to qualifications, we want to assure you that we possess a well-rounded and highly qualified educational background, coupled with extensive international experience and exposure. We acknowledge the IB certification of the Principal, Six teacher's and doctoral teachers.

4.  Despite employing a full-time psychologist and implementing strict anti-bullying policies, why do these issues persist week after week, month after month? Are there gaps in your policies or are they merely symbolic?

Influence of a good teacher in a student's life cannot be overstated. They play a vital role in fostering not only academic growth but also discipline, character development, and instilling important values that shape the their future.

However, When an unqualified individual leads, this is the result.

Silver Oaks International School - Rushikonda Campus - Rushikonda

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Silver Oaks is one of the best schools in Vizag, not just because of its brand, but also because of its excellent teachers. As a parent of two children who attend the school, I have personally experienced the school's commitment to helping all students succeed.

Recently, I had to raise a concern with the school about one of my children. The HSRM, Ms. Amitha, was incredibly welcoming and empathetic. She listened to my concerns and offered her support to help my child. She also mentioned that one of the school's principles is to help struggling students.
I was so relieved by Ms. Amitha's response. I also appreciate the class teachers, who are always patient and understanding with the students, regardless of their academic performance.

I would like to thank Principal Mam and all the staff of Silver Oaks for their dedication to taking care of the children.
